commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Manual review remains because the PR has a protected maintainer label, lacks required external-contributor real behavior proof, and changes auth-provider/config semantics.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the diff changes TypeScript auth/status logic and tests without new dependencies, workflows, scripts, or broader secret exposure. (sha=64a390f3706633b762c55f5f48ebb60e1cb60439)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `models status` to account for Gemini CLI runtime auth on canonical Google text routes and changes Gemini CLI OAuth setup to write model-scoped runtime policy.

PR surface: Source +61, Tests +196. Total +257 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run in this review; the linked issue gives a clear command path, and source inspection shows current main only reports Codex runtime auth routes while docs define the Google CLI runtime split.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review remains because the PR has a protected maintainer label, lacks required external-contributor real behavior proof, and changes auth-provider/config semantics.

target.title: fix(cli): show Gemini CLI runtime auth status
target.body:
## Summary
- include CLI runtime auth providers in `models status` runtime-auth accounting
- report canonical `google/*` text/default routes using `google-gemini-cli` as runtime auth routes while keeping image routes on Google API-key auth
- update Gemini CLI OAuth setup to write the existing provider/model-scoped `agentRuntime` policy on the default Google model instead of the ignored whole-agent runtime key
- add regression coverage for `GEMINI_API_KEY` plus Gemini CLI OAuth profile and for the login-generated config patch

Fixes #79585

## Test plan
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 2 files, 33 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/commands/models/list.status-command.ts src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/gemini-cli-provider.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/models/list.status-command.ts src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/gemini-cli-provider.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts`
- `git diff --check refs/remotes/upstream-safe/main...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`

Signed head: `64a390f3706633b762c55f5f48ebb60e1cb60439`.

Note: I still have not run live Gemini CLI OAuth proof on this machine.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
